title: AltLore
description: A tool for modpack authors or devs to add special lore to items when a key is held
body:
A tool for modpack authors or devs to add special lore to items when a key is held

 

Lore is controlled by data pack, add a file under a "altlore" directory with the file ending ".altlore"

 

The contents of the file should be, on each line, <item id>=<lore, with \n for newline>
